assertions.title: Landing page loads with hero content and CTA

steps.expected: Landing page loads with hero section
steps.observed: Landing page loaded with CareerAC title and hero content

steps.action: Take snapshot to identify interactive elements
steps.observed: CTA 'Get Started' link found at ref=e1
Sign-in page with Email/Password fields and 'Sign In' button visible
Mobile layout captured with readable text

assertions.title: Dashboard empty state

steps.action: Navigate to /auth/signup to create test user
Fill signup form with unique email

steps.expected: Account created and redirected to dashboard

assertions.issues: Signup rate limit prevents creating test user needed for VAL-PLAN-006. Attempted signups with multiple unique emails (test+group1-abc123@example.com, test+group1-fresh1@example.com, test+group1-fresh2@example.com) all returned 'email rate limit exceeded'. Waited 60+ seconds between attempts but rate limit persisted. Cannot test dashboard empty state without authenticated session.

frictions.description: Supabase auth rate limiting is aggressive - multiple signup attempts from same IP trigger rate limit that persists for extended period
frictions.resolution: Waited 60+ seconds between attempts, but rate limit still active. No workaround available.

blockers.description: Supabase email signup rate limit exceeded - cannot create test user to access dashboard. Error message: 'email rate limit exceeded'. Rate limit appears to be IP-based and lasts longer than 60 seconds.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Waited 60+ seconds between signup attempts, tried multiple unique email addresses, all attempts failed with same rate limit error

summary: Tested 4 assertions: 3 passed (VAL-AUTH-001, VAL-AUTH-006, VAL-LAYOUT-002), 1 blocked (VAL-PLAN-006). Blocker is Supabase auth rate limiting preventing test user creation. All public page assertions passed successfully.
